pof_p416.name: POF P416
pof_p416.meta_notes: Balanced all-rounder; Eagle Bearer is arguably best AR in game — strong sustained DPS and survivability via Tenacity talent; default starter weapon

m4.name: M4
m4.meta_notes: High stability and accuracy; excellent general-purpose AR; popular in burn/Ignited talent builds via Pyromaniac

g36.name: G36
g36.meta_notes: Longest range among standard ARs; slightly lower RPM; Born Great named variant features Perfect Stabilize talent

ak_m.name: AK-M
ak_m.meta_notes: Slower fire rate but high per-shot damage; Merciless exotic is one of the best burst-damage weapons in the game

pdr_c.name: PDR-C
pdr_c.meta_notes: Compact bullpup AR; Capacitor exotic excels in skill-damage hybrid builds stacking +1.5% Skill Damage per shot

lvoa_c.name: LVOA-C (Rifle Platform)
lvoa_c.meta_notes: Semi-auto rifle platform; St. Elmo's Engine exotic (70+1 mag, shock ammo) is sought-after for shock build synergies

chameleon.name: Chameleon
chameleon.meta_notes: Exotic only; adaptive talent rewards specific hit-zone streaks (heads/body/legs); effective range is SMG-like; niche use

fal.name: FAL SA-58
fal.meta_notes: Burst-fire or semi; lower RPM but high per-burst damage; Para variant useful for run-and-gun due to reduced size

sig_mpx.name: SIG MPX
sig_mpx.meta_notes: Backfire exotic stacks up to +200% crit damage; excellent crit build platform; high stability

cmmg_banshee.name: CMMG Banshee
cmmg_banshee.meta_notes: Lady Death exotic is widely considered the best SMG in the game; high DPS, close-range specialist

p90.name: P90
p90.meta_notes: Highest RPM SMG; The Chatterbox exotic provides magazine refill on kills and stacking fire rate; excellent for Hyena-themed builds

mp7.name: MP7
mp7.meta_notes: Very fast reload; cannot equip magazine mods; Oxpecker exotic synergizes with Ballistic Shield skill builds

pp_19.name: PP-19
pp_19.meta_notes: Largest SMG magazine (53 rounds); low accuracy limits effectiveness at range; niche sustained-fire role

mp5.name: MP5
mp5.meta_notes: Reliable mid-tier SMG; burst-fire variant offers different playstyle; no exotic or standout named variant limits ceiling

aug_a3_para.name: AUG A3 Para
aug_a3_para.meta_notes: Lower RPM and magazine vs peers; compact but outclassed by newer SMGs; no exotic variant

lmgs.core_bonus: Damage to Targets out of Cover

m249_b.name: M249 B / Mk46
m249_b.meta_notes: Pestilence exotic is meta for DoT/debuff builds; 100-round belt, high RPM; Black Friday named variant with Perfect Unhinged is top-tier DPS

mg5.name: MG5
mg5.meta_notes: Fast reload for an LMG (2.96s); Iron Lung exotic is a newer dragon-themed weapon with strong sustained fire; Infantry MG5 improves stability

m60.name: M60
m60.meta_notes: Longest effective range of LMGs (40m); Good Times named with Perfect Fast Hands; excellent damage-at-range platform; no exotic limits top-end

negev.name: Negev NG7
negev.meta_notes: Bullet King exotic features infinite ammo (regenerating magazine on kills); niche but beloved for wave-clear and lazy builds

1886.meta_notes: Diamondback exotic provides guaranteed crits and 20% amp damage on marked targets; top-tier for crit-stacking striker builds

sig_716.name: SIG 716
sig_716.meta_notes: Solid semi-auto rifle; long 45m range; CQB variant trades range for damage; Artist's Tool with Perfect Rifleman is versatile

lvoa_c_rifle.name: LVOA-C
lvoa_c_rifle.meta_notes: Fastest-firing rifle; 55m range; St. Elmo's Engine exotic stacks shock rounds for AoE damage; Surge named with Perfect Spike

lightweight_m4.name: Lightweight M4
lightweight_m4.meta_notes: Fast-firing rifle alongside LVOA-C; 55m range; no exotic/named variant limits its ceiling vs other archetypes

merciless_ruthless.name: AK-M Rifle (Merciless / Ruthless)
merciless_ruthless.meta_notes: Merciless/Ruthless exotic has binary trigger — fires on both pull and release; stacks grant +500% damage explosion at 7 stacks; extremely powerful burst

the_ravenous.name: The Ravenous (Custom P416 G3 Rifle)
the_ravenous.meta_notes: Dual-barrel exotic from Iron Horse Raid; fires both barrels simultaneously; offensive/defensive primer mechanic rewards shoulder-swapping playstyle

acr_ss.name: ACR SS
acr_ss.meta_notes: Versatile semi-auto; decent range; commonly used in rifle-focused skill builds; no exotic/strong named limits top tier

m700.name: M700 / Model 700
m700.meta_notes: Bolt-action bolt with large 7-round mag; Ekim's Long Stick with Perfect Ranger is strong for headshot builds; reliable all-rounder MMR

sr_1.name: SR-1
sr_1.meta_notes: Adrestia SR-1 is required crafting component for Nemesis exotic; Nemesis is top-tier MMR with charge mechanic dealing massive mark-based damage

m44.name: M44
m44.meta_notes: Bolt-action with 60m range — longest stock range of any MMR; Hunting variant has highest damage; Custom M44 offers fastest reload via detachable mag

m1a.name: M1A
m1a.meta_notes: Semi-auto MMR; fast 180 RPM for MMR class; 10-round mag; Blind Justice named features Perfect Eyeless talent; excellent versatility

srs_a1.name: SRS A1
srs_a1.meta_notes: Bolt-action with 10-round mag; slower RPM but larger capacity vs M700; Hide and Seek named for crit-based builds

g28.name: G28
g28.meta_notes: Fastest semi-auto MMR with 20-round mag; excellent choice for aggressive/sustained fire headshot builds; Future Perfect named with Perfect Vigilance

coil.name: Coil
coil.meta_notes: Exotic MMR; Coil talent amplifies damage with each kill up to a high multiplier; strong for high-level content and headshot-focused builds

spas_12.name: SPAS-12
spas_12.meta_notes: Sweet Dreams exotic enables one-shot melee kill on non-elites (Sandman talent); top-tier for melee-rush builds; Lullaby is identical alternate skin

m870.name: M870
m870.meta_notes: Standard pump-action; fastest pump shotgun; low 5-shell capacity and 11m range limits effectiveness; most modifiable platform

ksg.name: KSG
ksg.meta_notes: Largest shotgun magazine (12 rounds) via dual tube design; Overlord exotic applies movement speed debuff stacks; The Send-Off named with Perfect Distance

super_90.name: SASG-12 / Super 90
super_90.meta_notes: Only semi-auto shotgun; highest shotgun RPM (180); best for aggressive close-range DPS; Kard Custom named variant is strong

double_barrel.name: Double Barrel Shotgun
double_barrel.meta_notes: Two-shot burst capability; extreme burst at point blank; Cassidy/Defiler exotic fires both barrels at once; extremely high alpha but constant reloading

pistols.core_bonus: Damage to Targets out of Cover (varies by variant)

d50.name: D50
d50.meta_notes: Liberty exotic synergizes with Eagle Bearer — shooting enemies reduces EC cooldown and marks them; ideal for AR/pistol hybrid builds

model_686_magnum.name: Model 686 Magnum
model_686_magnum.meta_notes: Regulus exotic is top-tier pistol — fires explosive headshot rounds that chain kills; used in pistol and Gunslinger builds; 100% headshot damage multiplier

m9.name: M9
m9.meta_notes: Jack-of-all-trades semi-auto; largest standard pistol magazine; Mosquito exotic features unique drain/sustain mechanic; good secondary for many builds

m1911.name: M1911
m1911.meta_notes: Highest single-shot damage among standard pistols; very small 7-round mag and short 12m range; Mozambique Special with Perfect Breadbasket

93r.name: 93R
93r.meta_notes: Only burst-fire pistol; 3-round burst at 1100 RPM; excellent sustained DPS for a sidearm; large 20-round mag; popular in aggressive pistol builds

pf45.name: PF45
pf45.meta_notes: Well-rounded semi-auto pistol; Banshee named variant popular in aggressive sidearm builds; solid balance of damage and capacity

p320_xcompact.name: P320 XCompact
p320_xcompact.meta_notes: High RPM for a pistol; generous magazine; newer addition to roster; lacks exotic but useful as a fast-firing sidearm
